zh.lifeSummary: Sir Oliver Wise Lord Sydenham是Oliver Wise的兒子，於大約1447年出生在英國英格蘭戴文希登哈姆 達莫勒爾。他於1455年與Margaret Tremayne在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1527年11月30日在他的家鄉享年81歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文希登哈姆 達莫勒爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Oliver Wise Lord Sydenham是Oliver Wise的儿子，于大约1447年出生在英国英格兰戴文希登哈姆 達莫勒爾。他于1455年与Margaret Tremayne在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1527年11月30日在他的家乡享年81岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文希登哈姆 達莫勒爾。

nameMeanings.name: Wise
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname for a wise or learned person, from Middle English wise, wisse ‘wise’ (Old English wīs). This name has also absorbed Dutch Wijs and De Wijs, a nickname meaning ‘(the) wise’, and possibly cognates in other languages.
English: topographic name for someone who lived by the withies or willows, from Middle English withi, Old English wīthig ‘withy, willow’.
Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Weiss   ‘white’.

variants.name: Weiss
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Erwin, Hans, Gerhard, Fritz, Manfred, Egon, Armin, Arno, Gunther, Heinz.  Jewish Chaim, Moshe, Emanuel, Aron, Meyer, Mendel, Hyman, Isadore, Zvi, Shlomo.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): nickname for someone with white hair or a remarkably pale complexion, from Middle High German wīz, German weiss ‘white’. This surname is also found in Poland, Czechia, Slovakia, Slovenia, and Croatia, often as a German translation of a corresponding Slavic surnames, e.g. Slovenian Belec and Bele (see Belle ). It is also found in France (mainly Alsace and Lorraine), Denmark, and the Netherlands.

variants.name: Wiseman
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English wise ‘wise, discreet’ (see Wise 1) + man, also wise-man ‘wise, thoughtful, rational, skilled, or intelligent person, a cunning man’ (Old English wīs + mann). The name may also have been used ironically.

variants.name: Wyse
meanings: English and Irish (Waterford and Cork): mainly Irish and Scottish spelling of Wise . The name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century where it was also Gaelicized as de Uidheas.

nameMeanings.name: Oliver
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a French name, Olivier, recorded as the name of one of Charlemagne's paladins (retainers), the close companion in arms of Roland in the Chanson de Roland. Whereas Roland is headstrong and rash, Oliver is thoughtful and cautious. Ostensibly this name derives from Late Latin olivarius ‘olive tree’ ( compare Olive ), but Charlemagne's other paladins all bear solidly Germanic names, so it is more probably an altered form of a Germanic name, perhaps distantly connected with Old Norse Óleifr ‘ancestral relic’. It has remained in more or less continuous use since the medieval period, becoming ever more popular since the 1980s.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Oliver Wise Lord Sydenham was born about 1447, in Sydenham Damerel, Devon, England, United Kingdom as the son of Oliver Wise. He married Margaret Tremayne in 1455, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 30 November 1527, in his hometown, at the age of 81, and was buried in Sydenham Damerel, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Oliver Wise Lord Sydenham est né environ 1447, à Sydenham Damerel, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Oliver Wise. Il a épousé Margaret Tremayne en 1455, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 30 novembre 1527, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterré à Sydenham Damerel, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Oliver Wise Lord Sydenham wurde um 1447 in Sydenham Damerel, Devon, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Oliver Wise geboren. Er hat 1455 in Devon, England Margaret Tremayne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 30. November 1527 im Alter von 81 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Sydenham Damerel, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Oliver Wise Lord Sydenham è nato il circa 1447 nel Sydenham Damerel, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Oliver Wise. Lui sposato Margaret Tremayne nel 1455, nel Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 30 novembre 1527, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolto a Sydenham Damerel, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Oliver Wise Lord Sydenhamは約1447年にイギリスイギリスデボンシデンハム ダムレルでOliver Wiseの息子として生まれた。1455年にイギリスデボンでMargaret Tremayneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1527年11月30日に故郷で81歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンシデンハム ダムレルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Oliver Wise Lord Sydenham(은)는 대략 1447년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 시데함 다머에서 Oliver Wise의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1455년 영국 데폰에서 Margaret Tremayne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1527년 11월 30일 그의 고향에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 시데함 다머에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Oliver Wise Lord Sydenham nasceu aproximadamente 1447, em Sydenham Damerel, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Oliver Wise. Ele casou-se com Margaret Tremayne em 1455, em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 30 de novembro de 1527, em sua cidade natal, com 81 anos, e foi sepultado em Sydenham Damerel, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Oliver Wise Lord Sydenham родился около 1447 г. в местности сиденам дэмирэл, девон, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Oliver Wise. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Tremayne в 1455 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 30 ноября 1527 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 81 год и был похоронен в местности сиденам дэмирэл, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Sir Oliver Wise Lord Sydenham nació aproximadamente 1447, en Sydenham Damerel, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Oliver Wise. Se casó con Margaret Tremayne en 1455, en Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 30 de noviembre de 1527, en su pueblo, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultado en Sydenham Damerel, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
